name: Beach Golf
address: 603 Arnold Ave, Point Pleasant Beach, NJ 08742
about: Beach Golf is an indoor golf destination at the Jersey Shore featuring state-of-the-art Trackman simulator technology. The venue offers flexible play options, including open play, monthly memberships, and leagues, catering to both casual players and competitive golfers. It also provides a full range of services including lessons, club fittings, and repairs, all within a space designed for social gatherings and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman simulators with global courses and real-time metrics
Flexible pricing model including open play and affordable monthly memberships
BYOB and food-friendly environment perfect for social gatherings
Available for private events and leagues with a relaxed, beach-town vibe

food_and_drink.notes: Food-friendly, allowing catering or delivery to your bay

simulator_hardware.notes: Three simulator bays featuring global courses and real-time metrics

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue offers club rentals, fittings, and repairs, making it accessible for those without equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is BYOB and food-friendly, allowing you to bring your own drinks or have catering/local food delivered to your bay.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round is not explicitly mentioned, but open play is booked by the hour, with sessions starting at $75 per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is welcoming to juniors and youth, offering group lessons and a supportive environment for young golfers.
